name: 增加文章阅读量
code:
<?php
$articleId = $payload['article_id'] ?? null;

if (!$articleId) {
    return ['code' => 400, 'message' => 'Invalid article ID', 'data' => null];
}

$article = $db->table($prefix .'_mc_blog_article')->where('id', $articleId)->first();

if (!$article) {
    return ['code' => 404, 'message' => 'Article not found', 'data' => null];
}

$currentReadCount = $article->read_count ?? 0;
$db->query($prefix . '_mc_blog_article')
    ->where('id', $articleId)
    ->update(['read_count' => $currentReadCount + 1]);

return [
    'code' => 200,
    'message' => 'Read count updated',
    'data' => [
        'article_id' => $articleId,
        'new_read_count' => $currentReadCount + 1
    ]
];
